sections.paragraph: (“the flanks of Tabor,” or “the confidence of Tabor,” as being a fortified city), [Chisloth-tabor], pr.n. of a town at the foot of Mount Tabor, on the eastern boundary of the tribe of Zebulun, Jos 19:12 elsewhere more briefly called תָּבֹור. Jos 19:22 1Ch 6:62. [Probably the same place as כְּםֻלֹּות.]
